prompt: Average number of sections taught per professor by department

inputData.question: Average number of sections taught per professor by department

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Average number of sections taught per professor by department"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Average number of sections taught per professor by department"},"startedAt":1771855842993,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks for the average number of sections taught per professor by department. I need to:
1. Join professors to departments (via department_id)
2. Join professors to course_sections (via professor_id)
3. Count the number of sections per professor
4. Group by department and calculate the average sections per professor within each department

The schema confirms:
- professors table has department_id (FK to departments)
- course_sections table has professor_id (FK to professors)
- departments table has id and name

The query will:
1. Count distinct sections per professor per department
2. Calculate the average of those counts grouped by department
3. Order by department name for deterministic output","sql":"
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  ROUND(AVG(section_count), 2) AS avg_sections_per_professor
FROM (
  SELECT 
    p.id,
    p.department_id,
    COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count
  FROM professors p
  LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
  GROUP BY p.id, p.department_id
) prof_sections
JOIN departments d ON prof_sections.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name
","assumptions":["Sections are counted from the course_sections table where professor_id matches","Each row in course_sections represents one section taught","Professors with no sections are included with a count of 0","The average is calculated across all professors in each department"]},"endedAt":1771855866731},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

ORDER BY d.name

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Average Number of Sections Taught per Professor by Department

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  ROUND(AVG(section_count), 2) AS avg_sections_per_professor
FROM (
  SELECT 
    p.id,
    p.department_id,
    COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count
  FROM professors p
  LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
  GROUP BY p.id, p.department_id
) prof_sections
JOIN departments d ON prof_sections.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Average Number of Sections Taught per Professor by Department

result.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  ROUND(AVG(section_count), 2) AS avg_sections_per_professor
FROM (
  SELECT 
    p.id,
    p.department_id,
    COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count
  FROM professors p
  LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
  GROUP BY p.id, p.department_id
) prof_sections
JOIN departments d ON prof_sections.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
